problemInput.placeholder: What do you want to learn today? (e.g., Explain recursion, How does GPS work?)

problemInput.examplePrompt1: Explain quantum entanglement to me like I'm 5
problemInput.examplePrompt2: Help me understand the French Revolution
problemInput.examplePrompt3: What are the main arguments for and against utilitarianism?

eval.label: For HR
eval.title: Assess What Candidates Actually Understand
eval.subtitle: Conversational assessments that probe reasoning — not memorized answers. Get competency reports, not pass/fail scores.
eval.placeholder: Define an assessment topic (e.g., Python OOP, System Design, SQL joins)
eval.orTryOne: Or try one of these evaluation scenarios:
eval.topic1: Evaluate my Python skills: implement a binary search tree
eval.topic2: Test my SQL: write a query to find duplicate emails
eval.topic3: System design: design a URL shortener
eval.topic4: Explain Big-O of this algorithm and optimize it
eval.mockupQuote: Strong fundamentals in algorithms and SQL. Debugging async patterns needs improvement.
eval.problem1: Candidates memorize LeetCode solutions without understanding
eval.problem2: Take-home tests get outsourced or AI-assisted
eval.problem3: Live coding creates anxiety that masks true ability
eval.solution2: AI probes with follow-up questions, like a patient interviewer
eval.solution3: Reports show exactly where understanding breaks down
eval.disclaimer: Note: openLesson is a supplementary assessment tool, not a replacement for human judgment in hiring decisions.
eval.requestDemo: Request a Demo for Your Team
eval.demoSubtitle: See how conversational assessments can improve your hiring process.
eval.topicPlaceholder: Define an assessment topic (e.g., Python OOP, System Design, SQL joins)
eval.skillsPlaceholder: What skills should this assessment evaluate? (e.g., Backend Engineering, Data Analysis)

certify.label: For Careers
certify.title: Pass Your Certification by Actually Understanding It
certify.subtitle: Memorizing dumps gets you a pass. Understanding gets you a career. Our AI helps you build genuine mastery.
certify.placeholder: Practice a certification topic (e.g., AWS VPC design, PMP risk assessment)
certify.topic1: AWS Solutions Architect: design a multi-region architecture
certify.topic2: CompTIA A+: troubleshoot a network connectivity issue
certify.topic3: PMP: estimate project duration using PERT
certify.topic4: Google Cloud: design a scalable data pipeline
certify.problem1: Brain dumps teach pattern matching, not understanding
certify.problem2: You pass the exam but can't apply knowledge on the job
certify.problem3: Concepts fade within weeks of passing
certify.solution1: Explain concepts back — see exactly what you don't understand
certify.solution3: Walk into your exam confident because you actually know it
certify.buildRoadmapSubtitle: Enter a certification and we'll create a structured study plan with milestones.
certify.buildRoadmapExamples: AWS Solutions Architect, PMP, CPA, CompTIA A+, CISSP, Google Cloud

homeschool.label: For Families
homeschool.title: Be Your Child's Learning Partner, Not Their Expert
homeschool.subtitle: When they get stuck on topics you don't know, openLesson steps in with patient, guided tutoring.
homeschool.placeholder: What should your child learn today? (e.g., Fractions, Photosynthesis, WWII)
homeschool.topic2: World War II: causes and key events
homeschool.problem1: You can't be an expert in every subject
homeschool.problem2: Hard to know if they truly understand or just memorized
homeschool.solution1: Patient AI tutor available anytime, any subject
homeschool.solution2: Your child explains concepts back — gaps become visible
homeschool.solution3: You see reports showing what they actually understand
homeschool.affordabilityTitle: Unlimited learning for less than a single tutoring session
homeschool.affordabilitySubtitle: Pro plan: $14.99/month vs. $50-100/hour for human tutors
homeschool.buildCurriculumSubtitle: Create a structured learning plan aligned with your child's grade level.
homeschool.buildCurriculumExamples: 4th Grade Math, US History, Life Science, Grammar & Writing, World Geography, Chemistry

schools.label: For Schools
schools.title: See What Every Student Misunderstands — Before the Test
schools.subtitle: Assign topics as homework. AI tutors each student 1-on-1. You get reports showing exactly who needs help with what.
schools.placeholder: Enter a topic to assign (e.g., Quadratic equations, Essay thesis, Cell biology)
schools.topic4: Physics: Newton's laws in everyday life
schools.problem2: Homework shows if they got it right, not if they understand
schools.problem3: Struggling students don't always ask for help
schools.solution1: Every student gets patient, 1-on-1 guided tutoring
schools.solution2: AI identifies conceptual gaps, not just wrong answers
schools.solution3: You see class-wide patterns to adjust instruction
schools.leadSubtitle: We're partnering with early-adopter educators to build classroom tools.
schools.buildSyllabusSubtitle: Design a multi-week unit plan for your classroom.
schools.buildSyllabusExamples: Algebra 1, AP Biology, US History, Essay Writing, Chemistry, Physics

enterprise.label: For Sales
enterprise.title: Turn Product Knowledge Into Sales Confidence
enterprise.subtitle: Your reps explain concepts out loud. Our AI finds gaps in their understanding — before customers do.
enterprise.placeholder: Enter a training topic (e.g., Product demo, Objection handling, Compliance)
enterprise.topic1: Product knowledge: explain our pricing model to a customer
enterprise.topic2: Sales objection: handle 'your solution is too expensive'
enterprise.topic4: Technical demo: explain our API to a developer
enterprise.leadTitle: Get Early Access to Team Features
enterprise.leadSubtitle: Join the waitlist for team dashboards, SSO, and enterprise features.
enterprise.problem1: Reps memorize scripts but freeze when prospects go off-script
enterprise.problem2: Knowledge tests show memorization, not understanding
enterprise.problem3: Managers can't scale 1-on-1 coaching to every rep
enterprise.solution1: Reps explain products verbally — AI detects knowledge gaps
enterprise.solution2: Guiding questions build genuine understanding, not recitation
enterprise.solution3: Managers see exactly where each rep needs coaching
enterprise.buildProgramSubtitle: Design a multi-week training curriculum for your team.
enterprise.buildProgramPlaceholder: What should the training cover? (e.g., Product knowledge, Sales methodology)
enterprise.buildProgramExamples: Product Knowledge, Sales Objections, GDPR Compliance, Technical Demos, Onboarding, Leadership

coaching.subtitle: 1-on-1 coaching from the creator of Uncertain Systems. Learn the systematic approach to tackling any hard problem — math, physics, CS, or anything else.
coaching.thinkDontMemorizeDesc: Learn to derive answers from first principles instead of recalling formulas.
coaching.findStuckPointsDesc: Identify exactly where your reasoning breaks down and why.
coaching.buildIntuitionDesc: Develop a feel for when you're on the right track — and when you're not.
coaching.systematicApproachDesc: Learn a repeatable process for attacking any unfamiliar problem.
coaching.systematicProcessDesc: A repeatable process for attacking unfamiliar problems that you can use forever.
coaching.blindSpotsDesc: Clarity on exactly where your reasoning tends to break down and why.
coaching.mentalModelsDesc: Frameworks for building intuition and recognizing when you're stuck vs. on track.
coaching.personalizedStrategiesDesc: Specific techniques tailored to your goals — competition math, research, certifications.
coaching.realTimeThinking: Real-time thinking sessions on Uncertain Systems — no scripts, no edits.
coaching.philosophyQuote: The goal isn't to solve problems faster. It's to understand them so deeply that the solution becomes obvious.
coaching.bullet2: Learn how to think — not what to think
coaching.bullet3: Tackle any problem: math, physics, CS, or anything else
coaching.bullet4: Build a systematic approach to hard problems
coaching.bullet5: Develop intuition for when you're stuck
coaching.bullet6: Strategies for competition math, quantum mechanics, research
coaching.faqTopicsAnswer: Anything you want to think more clearly about — math (any level), physics, computer science, problem-solving strategy, research methodology, or general reasoning skills.
coaching.faqPrepareAnswer: Bring 1-3 specific problems or concepts you're struggling with. The more concrete your examples, the better we can work together to identify and address your stuck points.
coaching.faqFollowUpQuestion: What if I need follow-up sessions?
coaching.faqFollowUpAnswer: Many clients find 2-3 sessions valuable. DM me on X (@uncertainsys) to discuss package options or ongoing coaching arrangements.
coaching.faqLevelQuestion: Is this for beginners or advanced learners?
coaching.faqLevelAnswer: Both. Guided questioning works at any level — I meet you where you are and help you get unstuck, whether that's basic algebra or graduate-level quantum mechanics.
coaching.faqOpenlessonAnswer: I built openLesson to scale the coaching approach to everyone. The AI tutor uses the same guided questioning methodology. Coaching is the premium, personalized version with a human.

session.mobileDetectedDesc: This session is optimized for desktop. Use the mobile view for a better experience on this device.
session.welcomeMessage: Your tutor has prepared a personalized plan. Think out loud as you work through each step.
session.followPlan: Follow the session plan and use our guiding questions to advance
session.useSidebar: Use the sidebar for chat, canvas, and notes
session.encouragement: Your tutor adapts to your progress in real-time. Don't worry about sounding perfect.
session.grokipediaDesc: Search external knowledge sources for your topic
session.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permission and try again.
session.micError: Could not access microphone. Please grant permission and try again.
session.resumeMonitoringToUse: Resume monitoring to use the ILE tools
session.startMonitoringToUse: Start monitoring to use the ILE tools
session.chunksSelected: {selected} of {total} chunks selected for observation prompts
session.congratulationsComplete: Congratulations! You've completed all steps in your learning plan. Your session has been paused.
session.sessionNotFoundDesc: This session doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

probes.startSessionPrompt: Start your session to receive guiding questions
probes.formulatingQuestion: Your tutor is formulating an opening question...

tools.teachingAssistantDesc: Chat with an AI tutor that responds to your questions and helps you think through problems.
tools.canvasDesc: Whiteboard for diagrams, sketches, and visual thinking. Supports paste from clipboard.
tools.notebookDesc: Scratchpad for writing down your thoughts, notes, and insights.
tools.grokipediaSearch: Search external knowledge sources for background information on your topic.
tools.practiceDesc: Pre-session practice task. Auto-generates on first click.
tools.theoryDesc: Key concepts to review before or during your session. Auto-generates on first click.
tools.ragMatchesDesc: Search and select relevant knowledge chunks for observation prompts.
tools.dataInputDesc: Configure audio, EEG (Muse headset), and webcam inputs. View live audio levels, EEG band powers, and facial engagement metrics.
tools.logsDesc: Real-time data transfer health. Shows sent/saved/failed counts for audio, EEG, and facial data with status indicators.
tools.startSessionDesc: Begins audio recording and AI monitoring.
tools.pauseDesc: Pauses recording. Tools are locked until you resume.
tools.resetDesc: Clears all probes but keeps recorded data.
tools.closeDesc: Returns to dashboard without ending. Session can be resumed later.
tools.endSessionDesc: Stops recording, saves all data, and goes to the results page.
tools.guidingTasksDesc: AI-generated probes (questions, tasks, suggestions, checkpoints, feedback) that guide your learning. Up to 5 can be open at once. Archive them as you complete them.
tools.sessionPlanDesc: Step-by-step roadmap. Steps advance automatically or you can mark them complete manually. You can also roll back to a previous step.
tools.probeSlotsDesc: 5 slots shown at the top. When all are full, the AI stops generating new probes until you archive some.
tools.focusDesc: Click a probe to focus it. The AI will prioritize checking if focused probes are resolved.
tools.suggestedToolsDesc: Some probes suggest specific tools to try. Click the suggestions to switch to that tool.
tools.popOutDesc: Opens the Student Monitoring panel in a separate window. Useful for multi-monitor setups. All actions sync in real-time. Screen sharing is available in the pop-out window.
tools.smartphoneDesc: Opens a QR code you can view on your phone. Data syncs automatically.
tools.dragSeparatorDesc: Resize the tools and monitoring panels.
tools.hoverSeparatorDesc: Chevron buttons appear to collapse either panel to full width.
tools.clickCollapsedDesc: Restore the panel to its previous width.
tools.step1: Create a session with a topic you want to learn.
tools.step2: Start the session — your microphone begins recording.
tools.step3: Think out loud. The AI listens and generates guiding tasks.
tools.step4: Work through the probes using the tools (chat, canvas, notebook, etc.).
tools.step5: Archive probes as you resolve them to make room for new ones.
tools.step6: Follow the session plan steps or mark them complete manually.
tools.step7: End the session when you feel confident. Review your results.
tools.audioDesc: Microphone recording. Live audio levels shown when recording.
tools.webcamDesc: Facial engagement tracking (attention, confusion, emotion, gaze). No video is sent to the server.
tools.spaceDesc: Force a new probe while recording

agenticMode.title: Agentic Mode
agenticMode.subtitle: Let your own personal assistant teach you using our tools. Programmatic access to openLesson for AI agents and autonomous apps.
agenticMode.experimentalDesc: does not yet support the full tutoring harness. Working on it.
agenticMode.audioOnly: Audio-only: The analyze endpoint accepts ONLY audio (base64 encoded). Do not send text - the system will reject it.
agenticMode.supportedFormats: Supported formats: webm, mp4, ogg (Opus codec preferred)
agenticMode.daysParam: Days: Use numeric days (7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 180) to constrain plan size. Default: 30 days.
agenticMode.authentication: Authentication: Include your API key in the Authorization header:

about.heroTitle: An AI Tutor That Listens to You Think
about.heroSubtitle: The best way to learn isn't being told the answer—it's discovering it yourself through the right questions. openLesson listens to your reasoning and asks questions that reveal gaps you didn't know you had.
about.understandingDesc: We believe the goal of learning is to understand deeply, not to get answers quickly. That's why we never give solutions — only questions.
about.openSourceDesc: Education technology should be accessible to everyone. openLesson is fully open source — run it yourself, modify it, build on it.
about.audioFirstDesc: Speaking activates different cognitive processes than typing. When you verbalize your reasoning, gaps in understanding become obvious.
about.guidedDesc: Questions that guide you to understanding rather than telling you what to think. The best way to learn is to discover answers yourself.
about.pickTopicDesc: Choose what you want to understand better — math, physics, business concepts, anything.
about.thinkOutLoudDesc: Explain your reasoning verbally. Our AI analyzes your speech in real-time for logical gaps.
about.getQuestionedDesc: Receive targeted guiding questions that reveal what you don't quite understand yet.
about.weListenDesc: ChatGPT answers your questions. openLesson listens to YOUR answers and finds the holes in your reasoning.
about.audioFirstLearnDesc: Speaking activates different neural pathways than typing. When you verbalize your thinking, gaps become obvious.
about.neverGivesAnswersDesc: We use guided questioning — leading you to understanding through questions, not handing you solutions.
about.useItYourWayDesc: openLesson adapts to how you learn—at home, in the classroom, or at work.
about.homeschoolDesc: Guide your kids through any subject with AI that asks the right questions.
about.schoolsDesc: Classroom tools that let teachers see how each student thinks.
about.enterpriseDesc: Train teams on products, compliance, and sales through active learning.
about.certificationsDesc: Prepare for AWS, PMP, and other exams by truly understanding the material.
about.whatMakesDifferentDesc: Most AI tools give you answers. We help you find them yourself.
about.watchMeThinkDesc: Real-time problem solving on Uncertain Systems. No scripts, no edits.
about.fullyOpenSourceDesc: openLesson is released under an open source license. You can self-host it, modify it, and build on it. We believe educational technology should be accessible to everyone.
about.experienceYourselfDesc: Start your first session free. See what guided questioning feels like.
about.faqLanguagesAnswer: openLesson currently supports English only. We're actively working on adding support for Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, and other languages — coming soon!
about.faqTokenAnswer: The $UNSYS token is a Solana-based token that lets you financially support openLesson and become a Partner. Partners stake tokens and earn revenue share (10-50%) from users they refer. It's our way of aligning incentives with our community. Learn more in the Partner dashboard.
about.faqPartnerQuestion: How does the Partner program work?
about.faqPartnerAnswer: Stake $UNSYS tokens to become a Partner and earn revenue share from your referrals. Bronze (1M tokens) earns 10%, Silver (2M) earns 30%, and Gold (5M) earns 50%. Partners get a unique referral link and can track earnings in their dashboard.
about.faqDifferentQuestion: How is this different from ChatGPT or other AI tutors?
about.faqDifferentAnswer: Most AI tools give you answers when you ask questions. openLesson flips this: it listens to YOUR answers and asks you questions when it detects gaps in your reasoning. It's the Socratic method, powered by AI.
about.faqFreeAnswer: We offer a free tier with limited sessions per month. For unlimited learning, check out our Regular ($9.99/mo) or Unlimited ($19.99/mo) plans on the pricing page.
about.faqSubjectsQuestion: Can I use openLesson for any subject?
about.faqSubjectsAnswer: Yes! openLesson works for any topic you want to understand better — math, physics, history, business concepts, certification prep, and more. If you can explain it, we can question it.
